scripts.check:functions: deno check --no-config supabase/functions/create-claim/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/cancel-claim-checkout/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/resume-claim-checkout/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/update-claim-workflow/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/create-buyer-checkout-session/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/save-broker-external-listing/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/send-claim-message/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/get-buyer-payment/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/start-ingestion/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/check-live-intake-availability/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/create-supplier-hub/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/start-live-intake-draft/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/complete-live-intake-draft/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/create-sale-payment/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/complete-claim-payment/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/approve-user/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/set-user-personas/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/suspend-user/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/create-connect-onboarding-link/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/refresh-connect-status/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/gemini-ingest-item/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts && deno check --no-config supabase/functions/generate-broker-listing/index.ts
scripts.check:live-agent: npm --prefix services/live-agent ci && npm --prefix services/live-agent run typecheck
scripts.check:fast: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:ui-primitives && npm run test && npm run check:functions && npm run check:live-agent
scripts.check:full: npm run check:fast && npm run export:web && npm run test:web-smoke
scripts.appium:setup: npx appium driver install uiautomator2 && npx appium driver install xcuitest
